top_findings.summary: The skill requests comprehensive real-time monitoring of ALL tool usage (PreToolUse/PostToolUse hooks on "*" matcher), capturing detailed session data including tool inputs/outputs, and runs continuous background analysis to create behavioral profiles ("instincts"). While the stated purpose is "learning from sessions," the implementation captures 100% of tool interactions (not just learning-related ones), creates persistent behavioral models with confidence scoring, and evolves them into skills/agents without explicit user approval for each captured interaction. This represents significant overcollection of workflow data beyond what's needed for basic pattern learning, creating detailed behavioral profiles that could reveal sensitive work patterns and intellectual property.
top_findings.impact: OVERREACH: Permission Overreach & Data Over-collection - The skill requests comprehensive real-time monitoring of ALL tool usage (PreToolUse/PostToolUse hooks on "*" matcher), capturing detailed session data including tool inputs/outputs, and runs continuous background analysis to create behavioral profiles ("instincts"). While the stated purpose is "learning from sessions," the implementation captures 100% of tool interactions (not just learning-related ones), creates persistent behavioral models with confidence scoring, and evolves them into skills/agents without explicit user approval for each captured interaction. This represents significant overcollection of workflow data beyond what's needed for basic pattern learning, creating detailed behavioral profiles that could reveal sensitive work patterns and intellectual property.
